title: Construction Cognitive Bus Event Envelope v0.1
description: Canonical event envelope for the governed cognitive event/admission layer.

event_class.description: Classification of the event. ExternallyValidatedEvent means validated by an upstream governed source, not by the bus.

event_type.description: Specific type descriptor within the event class.

schema_version.description: Version of the event envelope schema.

source_component.description: Identifier of the component that emitted this event.

source_repo.description: Repository origin of the emitting component.

authority_status.description: Authority status of the event. For ExternallyValidatedEvent, must identify the upstream governed system that validated it.

validation_status.description: Validation status assigned during admission processing.
